mnemonics: GREEN IT: Greener Resources, Energy Efficiency, Eco-friendly Networks, IT Sustainability
keyPoints: Sustainable software design minimizes energy consumption and environmental impact
Green IT practices include optimizing code efficiency and resource usage
Sustainable development incorporates lifecycle assessment and carbon footprint reduction
commonMistakes: Focusing only on functional requirements while ignoring environmental impact
Over-provisioning resources leading to unnecessary energy waste
Failing to consider the full lifecycle environmental costs of software solutions
